string 2: We have to find better fighters!

Those Titans know no mercy... Whatever fighters we find,
they need to be ready to face them!
Is it just me, or does something seem really off?
Everyone seems on edge... They're all worked up...
It sounds like they're gonna fight the Titans...

Ah, you have returned... Your many brave deeds... have
helped us greatly.
Ngh...
D-Don't strain yourself!
So, the poison... It's spread pretty bad now, has it...?

This is no time to be whining about myself. Things are
already in motion.
In motion?
Everyone's acting so strange... What in the world is going on?

We have learned that the Titans are preparing to raid
Rebellion Village.

They may very well intend to subjugate the human world
once they seize this location.
That, of all things... must be avoided.

We cannot allow the raid to succeed! This is also my way
of demonstrating my good faith toward you.
Thank you, Merukimon...

The enemy is concentrating their forces on Central Town...
Our own units have already engaged them.
We'll help, too!

No, I have a different favor to ask of you... We find ourselves
beset by another crisis.

I hear of suspicious activity among the humans. D-SAT has
some plot afoot, it would seem.

I wish for you all to guard our rear while our attention is
elsewhere! Speak to Dr. Simmons for more details.
Thanks to all of you, the Titan forces have diminished...

We are finally able to communicate with... the Digimon
who remained on the other side.

This is an ideal opportunity, one that you created for us.
We can now take back what the Titans stole...

...by force...! Even if it means both sides end up
dying by each other's swords...!
B-Both sides?!
But, before, we were talking about just negotiating with the Titans!
The... circumstances have changed...

From the beginning, certain of our number have been pressing
for the use of force to take back what was lost.

Surely you know of them already... They are the ones from
the Colosseum.
Their voices... can no longer be ignored. The reason being...
...that I do not have much time left.
I must create a path forward for those who will remain...
So... the poison really has spread...

If I should perish... the Digimon here will no longer heed
leadership.

And if things go poorly, they may even turn their fury on
the humans as well.
That, of all things... must be avoided.
This is also my way of demonstrating my good faith to you.
Merukimon...

Nevertheless... we have not entirely discarded the
possibility of negotiations.

We will launch an attack upon Central Town immediately. The
Titans there will likely be taken by surprise.

Plutomon, the enemy leader, has proven entirely unwilling to 
discuss terms thus far.

But if we "put up a good fight"... it should prompt a somewhat 
different response.
...I get it now.

So you're saying you need to fight in order to bring the
other side to the bargaining table?

Yes. But to do that... we must inflict undeniable damage
upon them. Thus, I must fight on the front line personally.

We will also have need of negotiators... and I can think of
no one more suited to entrust with that role than you.
May I ask this of you?
Of course.
We have no reason to refuse.
Yes.

The preparations have already been made. After all, time is
not a luxury that we have...
We will now commence the operation to retake Central Town.

As our negotiators, I ask that you head to the Dark Field, 
where Plutomon can be found.
Our hopes rest in you.
What happened, Dr. Simmons?

Thanks to her efforts while undercover, we've found out that
public safety is up to something.

They're in the process of activating some giant, unidentified 
weapon under the city.
I think it's likely that their target is... right here—Rebellion Village.
H-Here...?!
They seriously intend to erase all Digimon from this world.

Due to the weapon's enormous size, it will take time to
activate. We still have a chance to intervene.

While it pains me to ask you for aid just because you're
related to one of their commanders, will you help us?
You mean... try to reason with my dad? Yes, of course I'll try.

With how close Aegiomon and I have become... my words
should mean something.

Nothing good ever comes of violence. It's my duty to get
that through to him!
...I'll have to leave it to you, then.{next}
At this point, you're the only one who can convince him.{next}
Sorry for putting you in danger...{next}
...Okay. I'll try.

I know. I've been giving it a lot of thought lately...
what I can do for everyone.
No, you don't need to apologize, {player}. This is my choice...!

The path connecting the village to the lab hasn't been
closed off...

...so I believe you should still be able to use it as a
point of entry.

We're counting on you. Please... stop my former colleagues
from making a terrible mistake.
